examples: Our committee doesn't need any more help. We have superabundance of helpers.
In spite of the superabundance of its martial spirit, it could not escape an early death.
And by granting it He not merely satisfies our natural desire for happiness but He satisfies it in superabundance.
The senior vice president of a large financial services division was feeling overloaded by a superabundance of weekly data.
Not everyone, and surely not every company, is feeling abundant these days, though Harris says the era of capital superabundance is here regardless.
